csv/csvreader/__next__.name: __next__
csv/csvreader/__next__.description: Return the next row of the reader’s iterable object as a list (if the object was returned from reader()) or a dict (if it is a DictReader instance), parsed according to the current Dialect. Usually you should call this as next(reader).
